title: January 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 12''' is the 12th day of the year. 353 days (354 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Long John Baldry]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[John Jackson Miller]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 82|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 82]] is published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[A New Hope (Shimmer Book)]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Swarm]]'' is published.
*[[2000]] – [[Union 3|''Union'' 3]] is published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[What's The Story?]]'' [http://www.starwars.com/databank/updates/news20070112.html Episode I (Round 8)] published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2011]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 4|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 4]] is published.
*[[2013]] – "[[Point of No Return (The Clone Wars)|Point of No Return]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2020]] – "[[The New World]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*2020 – "[[No Place Safe]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: I Love You. I Know.]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Han Solo (reference book)|''Han Solo'']] is published in Spain.
*[[2022]] – "[[Chapter 3: The Streets of Mos Espa]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2022 – [[Bounty Hunters 20|''Bounty Hunters'' 20]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars (2020) 20|''Star Wars'' (2020) 20]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Eye of the Storm 1|''The High Republic: Eye of the Storm'' 1]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 12|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 12]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Bob Machray]] dies.
